instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: The school magazine
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m helping with the next school magazine, and I’d like you to write something for it. [1]Would you like to write a review of a film?[/1]||[2]Can you send it to me by Friday?[/2] The magazine has to be ready soon.||[3]What photos should we put with your article?[/3]||[4]Do you want your name to appear under the article?[/4]||Thanks||Chloe

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Chloe,||Thanks for asking me. [1]Yes, I’d like to write a review of a film because I watched a really good adventure film last weekend.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t send it by Friday because I have two tests this week. I can send it on Sunday evening instead.[/2]||[3]We could put a picture of the cinema and maybe a photo of the film poster with the article.[/3]||[4]Yes, I’d like my name to appear under it because I’m proud of my writing.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Ryan
